description: Plugin-distributed hooks for higher-education-administration. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags higher-ed anti-patterns (discount/aid decision with no net-revenue basis, retention claim with no cohort/persistence basis, student-data handling with no FERPA note). Set HIGHERED_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
